generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real-time speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data transmitted from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance IntelD435iVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCServiceEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCServiceEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering point cloud data from LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (performance class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCServiceEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU acceleration and system tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time data transmission between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppROS2Nodes : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for managing ROS2 node lifecycles"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data, object tracks, and timeseries reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Kalman filter-based object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCServiceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control logic execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, ACCDisableAction, SpeedSetAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of environment based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingReportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for operators to monitor ACC performance"
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decisions based on lead vehicle distance for speed adjustment and emergency braking commands"
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D environment visualization for operators"
]

instance TroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports for developers to troubleshoot"
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity containing physical components"
    base:contains SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity containing virtual components and models"
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogic, SQLDatabaseEnabler, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CppROS2Nodes, MATLABSimulink, PointCloudClusteringEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler, ACCServiceEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator and developer interactions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals from DT to PT including desired speed commands (converted to motor voltage via Actuation FE), emergency braking commands, and ACC enable/disable commands through the Control Panel UI, with latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (per R8), as required for safety-critical ACC system compliance with 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "During vehicle operation (as operated) for optimization and health monitoring; the case study focuses on operational phase with ACC system implementation, though DTs in automotive are also used in design phase for experimentation and validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-vehicle communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms per R7."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) hosted in cloud; User Entity deployed on remote machines for operator access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs; ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622 standard for performance class I (no road curvature capabilities)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622; latency and clock synchronization requirements address safety aspects; no specific security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
